variants: Jordan Caruso has a rich background in languages, particularly in Italian phonetics, which he studied at Ivory Knot Academy. Born on Primrose Lane, he currently works for Xanadu Thread Collective, where his expertise is put to good use. In addition to his professional life, he dedicates time to volunteering as a Citizenship Coach at Polestar Assembly, guiding individuals through their civic responsibilities. His roles reflect his commitment to both language and community service.

As a Citizenship Coach at Polestar Assembly, Jordan Caruso plays a vital role in educating citizens about their rights and responsibilities. His journey began on Primrose Lane, leading him to Ivory Knot Academy, where he focused on Italian phonetics. Now employed at Xanadu Thread Collective, Jordan integrates his linguistic skills into his work. Balancing professional demands with volunteer efforts, he exemplifies a passion for civic engagement and personal empowerment.
